articleTitle: Wallis's Wonderful Wriggling Wirral Wacky Worm
introSection:
Wallis's Wonderful Wriggling Wirral Wacky Worm was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri previously located at New Palace and Adventureland in New Brighton, Merseyside, England, UK.

Wallis is the surname of park operators David and Michael. The town in which the park is located is situated on the Wirral Peninsula. Wacky Worm is the type of roller coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a Wacky Worm layout

fullText:
Wallis's Wonderful Wriggling Wirral Wacky Worm was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri previously located at New Palace and Adventureland in New Brighton, Merseyside, England, UK.

Wallis is the surname of park operators David and Michael. The town in which the park is located is situated on the Wirral Peninsula. Wacky Worm is the type of roller coaster.

The ride has a Wacky Worm layout
